name: Esben's Shaman Attire
description: Notes A good defensive robe, the Shaman Attire is a direct upgrade to the Soulless Robe with an additional +6 ATT (equal to the T14 Robe of the Ancient Intellect). However, it provides no boost to MP or WIS. Not an impressive UT, but not a bad one either.
effects: On Taking Damage: 40% chance to Slowed enemies within 6 tiles for 5 seconds. Cooldown: 5 seconds
